allow: Bash(printf '\\n# SQLite WAL temp files \(results.db itself IS tracked\)\\nresults.db-wal\\nresults.db-shm\\n')
Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "from results_db import query_stats; s=query_stats\(\); print\(s\)")

Bash(python3 -c "from results_db import query_concept_stats; print\(''''concept_stats import OK:'''', list\(query_concept_stats\(\).keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
from results_db import query_concept_stats
cs = query_concept_stats\(\)
print\('TF coverage:', {k: v['total'] for k, v in cs['timeframes'].items\(\)}\)
print\('Missing TFs from data:', [tf for tf in ['5m','15m','30m','1h','4h','6h','12h','1d','1w'] if tf not in cs['timeframes']]\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
from results_db import query_concept_stats
cs = query_concept_stats\(\)
print\('Top indicators by best sharpe:'\)
inds = sorted\(cs['indicators'].items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1]['best'] or 0, reverse=True\)[:8]
for k,v in inds: print\(f'  {k}: best={v[\\"best\\"]:.3f}, total={v[\\"total\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
print\('TF stats:'\)
for k,v in cs['timeframes'].items\(\): print\(f'  {k}: best={v[\\"best\\"]:.3f}, total={v[\\"total\\"]}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
from results_db import query_concept_stats
cs = query_concept_stats\(\)
print\('TF stats:'\)
for k,v in sorted\(cs['timeframes'].items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1]['best'] or 0, reverse=True\):
    print\(f'  {k}: best={v[\\"best\\"]:.3f}, total={v[\\"total\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
best_ind = max\(cs['indicators'].items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1]['best'] or 0\)
print\(f'Best indicator: {best_ind[0]} best={best_ind[1][\\"best\\"]:.3f}'\)
")

")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
from results_db import query_concept_stats
import json
cs = query_concept_stats\(\)
inds = cs.get\('indicators', {}\)
sorted_inds = sorted\(inds.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1]['total'], reverse=True\)[:25]
for k,v in sorted_inds:
    print\(f'{k}: total={v[\\"total\\"]} kept={v[\\"kept\\"]} best={v[\\"best\\"] and round\(v[\\"best\\"],3\)}'\)
")

Bash(.venv/bin/python3 -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('results.db'\)
rows = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT strategy FROM results WHERE strategy LIKE 'mtf_5m%' OR strategy LIKE 'mtf_1w%' LIMIT 5\\"\).fetchall\(\)
print\('5m/1w strategies:', rows\)
from results_db import query_concept_stats
cs = query_concept_stats\(\)
tfs = cs.get\('timeframes', {}\)
print\('5m stats:', tfs.get\('5m'\)\)
print\('1w stats:', tfs.get\('1w'\)\)
")
